description: The Maserati MC12, produced from 2004 to 2005, was built to homologate the MC12 GT1 race car. Based on the Ferrari Enzo platform with a 6.0-litre V12 producing 622 bhp, just 50 were built — 25 road cars and 25 Corsa track versions. It is one of the rarest and most valuable modern supercars.
